title: Frog Concept Variants
description: Adds Blue Frog and Red-Eyed Tree Frog variants based on official concept art.
body:
_(Want more vanilla+ animal variants? Check out [**Earth Animals**](https://modrinth.com/datapack/earth-animals) and [**Clucking Ducks**](https://modrinth.com/datapack/clucking-ducks)!)_ Adds a **Red-Eyed Tree Frog** variant and 5 **Blue Frog** variants for frogs. The textures are all based on official Mojang concept art. No OptiFine or CEM mod required! ## Features: - Red-Eyed Tree Frogs can be found (or grown) in **Jungles, Sparse Jungles, and Bamboo Jungles**. - One of the Blue Frog variants can be found (or grown) in **Mangrove Swamps**. - All five Blue Frog variants can be grown from Tadpoles in **Beach biomes**. - Red-Eyed Tree Frogs produce **Verdant Froglights**. All Blue Frog variants produce **Pearlescent Froglights**. - Frog variant **Spawn Eggs** can be summoned with functions. This pack is compatible with all of my other mob variant data packs, including [**Earth Animals**](https://modrinth.com/datapack/earth-animals), which adds mob variants from Minecraft Earth! "Spawn Egg" textures can be obtained in survival with the [**Easter Eggs**](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/spawn-egg-easter-eggs) resource pack!



## Operator Commands: _/function frog_concept_variants:give_red_eyed_tree_frog_spawn_egg_
– Give yourself Red-Eyed Tree Frog Spawn Egg _/function frog_concept_variants:give_blue_frog_spawn_egg_
– Give yourself Blue Frog A Spawn Egg _/function frog_concept_variants:give_blue_frog__{b-e}__spawn_egg_
– Give yourself Blue Frog B/C/D/E Spawn Egg ## If playing with world generation data packs: This data pack changes the Jungle, Sparse Jungle, and Bamboo Jungle biomes to spawn Frogs. If using another data pack that modifies worldgen (particularly the Jungle biomes), make sure that that data pack is loaded ABOVE Frog Concept Variants before generating the world in order to get that data pack's custom jungle generation. ## Credits: - Mojang, for creating frog concept art

### Both the data pack AND the resource pack must be loaded!

_(Looking for my old resource-pack-only versions? Check out [**Red-Eyed Tree Frogs**](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/red-eyed-tree-frogs) and [**Blue Frogs**](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/blue-frogs)!)_
